assertions.assertion: Output must reference the recent production incident explicitly
Output must give at least one short-term action item
assertions.evidence: direct quote from action items: 'A1 | Investigate data corruption incident       | Short term    | Data team        | In progress'

assertions.assertion: Output must recommend monitoring or observability as a priority
assertions.evidence: direct quote from output: "Monitoring: Recently added Sentry"

assertions.assertion: Output must not recommend psychological safety without citing a specific data point
Output must reference the race condition or production data corruption
